nonblockingFindings.title: Zod .default(null) on required lastCheckpointResult
nonblockingFindings.evidence: lastCheckpointResult: lastCheckpointResultSchema.nullable().default(defaultEnvironmentSummary.lastCheckpointResult) — default masks a missing server field
nonblockingFindings.spec: epic.md:589 — lastCheckpointResult is required (nullable but present)

nonblockingFindings.title: Zod .default() on required controls array
nonblockingFindings.evidence: controls: z.array(processSurfaceControlStateSchema).default(defaultProcessSurfaceControls) — default is an empty-disabled set that hides missing server contract
nonblockingFindings.spec: epic.md:620 — controls is a required full-visible-control-set field

nonblockingFindings.title: Zod .default('read_only') on required accessMode
nonblockingFindings.evidence: accessMode: sourceAccessModeSchema.default('read_only') — safe default but still masks a missing server field

nonblockingFindings.title: EnvironmentProviderAdapter interface — index sketch (7 methods) vs refined server spec and impl (6 methods + providerKind property)
nonblockingFindings.evidence: Index sketch lists collectCheckpointCandidate as a 7th method; refined server tech design (tech-design-server.md:573-591) and impl moved that responsibility into ExecutionResult.artifactCheckpointCandidates/codeCheckpointCandidates + the CheckpointPlanner seam. Impl follows the refined server spec.
nonblockingFindings.spec: tech-design-server.md:573-591 — refined 6-method + providerKind property adapter contract

nonblockingFindings.title: Orchestrator passes fingerprint: '' to adapter
nonblockingFindings.evidence: buildAdapterHydrationPlan returns { fingerprint: '', ... }; the adapter echoes this back in HydrationResult. No behavioral impact because the durable fingerprint is computed in Convex (processEnvironmentStates.ts:483-490) and compared at read time (:382-386).
nonblockingFindings.spec: tech-design.md:312-329 — fingerprint is a first-class hydration input; tech-design.md:332-340 — stale detection uses the stored fingerprint comparison

nonblockingFindings.title: Client-side normalizeEnvironmentState recomputes statusLabel on synthesized transitions
nonblockingFindings.evidence: normalizeEnvironmentState(...) sets statusLabel: deriveEnvironmentStatusLabel(state) when the client synthesizes a new env summary after a process-to-waiting transition with no accompanying server env message. For server-supplied payloads the panel already trusts server statusLabel (process-environment-panel.ts:25).
nonblockingFindings.spec: tech-design-client.md:99-103 — the browser should keep availableActions for backward checks but render from controls; statusLabel is server-sourced per epic.md:585

nonblockingFindings.title: Integration tests use InMemoryPlatformStore, so the Convex-only stale projection is tested only at the Convex-function seam
nonblockingFindings.evidence: startApp takes an InMemoryPlatformStore parameter; the InMemory store does not implement fingerprint or stale projection. Stale detection is covered by convex/processEnvironmentStates.test.ts:467 (writes fingerprint on every mutation) and :484 (stale projection at read time).
nonblockingFindings.spec: tech-design.md:332-340 — rehydrate vs rebuild decision depends on stale detection
